name: ttrpg_campaign_tracker
author: https://github.com/mattred1
title: TTRPG campaign tracker
description: A space to help you keep track of the TTRPG campaign you are a part of, or running. Take detailed session notes, describe fantastical locations, and build out your world. Works with any gaming system you use, such as Dungeons & Dragons, Call of Cthulhu, etc.
